stops.extraction_target: Count the number of restaurants near 36.85000

riddle:
Here is the revised riddle:

1. Seek the platform known for its marine mythos and cryptocurrency trading: in the section recounting its founding years, how many founders are named there? After you note that count, search for the biography of the long-serving scientist who serves as chair of Apple Inc. to continue.

2. There exists a biographical page for that Apple chair; in the early life and education subsection, record the year in which he received his Bachelor of Science from the University of Washington, then click the linked label near the article header that reads "Article" to proceed on the same biography.

3. What arithmetic task transforms the undergraduate year you just found into a new number? Take that year and compute the sum of its distinct prime factors (hint: sum of its distinct prime factors).

4. If you visit the federal executive department responsible for law enforcement and legal affairs on Wikipedia, count how many language links are shown at the top of that article; once found, seek the page describing the famed British Overseas Territory in the North Atlantic to move on.

5. The article whose opening line names that North Atlantic British Overseas Territory asks you to consult nation statistics — using a country-population lookup, what is the current population of the United Kingdom?

6. In discussions of America's global priorities, the page about the nation's foreign policy displays language links at its head; note how many languages are listed there, then follow the in-text link that points to the major global intergovernmental organization to continue.

7. The assembly of nations' article (that global intergovernmental organization) shows a multilingual count beneath its title; how many languages are indicated under that article's heading? Afterward, search for the Texan border city opposite Nuevo Laredo to proceed.

8. (Peek at the border city's page on the Texas side — the one across from Nuevo Laredo) — how many languages is that article available in? Click the nearby "Article" link on that page to remain on the same entry for the next step.

9. Consider this arithmetic task: take the language-count number you obtained from the Texas border city's article and determine how many positive divisors that figure has (hint: count all divisors of that integer).

10. Ask now: consult the page for the largest city in Virginia and, using a places search around latitude 36.85000, how many restaurants are reported near that coordinate?

11. At last, compute this explicitly and give a single digit (0–9): (clue 2 + clue 6) % 10. Use only the numeric values you recovered for clue 2 and clue 6 when evaluating this expression.

metadata.theme: From crypto exchange to global financial and regulatory context — following Kraken as a lens into markets, major tech finance, legal authority, offshore jurisdictions, and the physical distances that shape enforcement and commerce.
